text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days after Mejiro Ardan's debut race, I pay
her a visit while she recuperates at her family's
rest house.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Trainer.
choice_data_list: Good morning.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text:
I presume you're here to see Lady Ardan? Allow
me to lead the way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow after Mejiro Ardan's nanny and, a short
distance from the rest house, we reach a small
woodland area where Mejiro Ardan is relaxing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hello there, Trainer. How lovely that you've come
to see me.
choice_data_list: ...How's your body feeling?
...How's your body feeling?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's absolutely fine. The chief physician said that
I've regained my strength and am at least as
healthy as I was before my debut.
choice_data_list: That's a relief.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, would you care to take a nice, relaxing
stroll with me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I wish to speak with you in private.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan takes me to an elevated clearing on
a small hill past the woods.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
This moment, right now, is a critical juncture for
you.
choice_data_list: Do you mean—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I can hazard a good guess at how your
conversation with my physician went the other
day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The man is my family's most esteemed physician,
and I've known him since I was little. As such, I
trust him as much as I do Nanny.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And accordingly, anything he's said regarding my
condition... is to be trusted.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: That said...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Even if his concerns regarding my body are
justified... and even if the path I tread is as
treacherous as thin ice...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I shan't ever give up.
choice_data_list: Ardan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: But of course, this decision reflects only my wishes... and not yours, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I believe that by now, you must know all too well
how unreliable and hazy an individual I can be. I
even collapsed after my debut race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer, if you do choose to stay by my side...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You'll be managing a racer as fragile and delicate
as a glass ornament.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Could you still adorn me on the track... knowing
that you might end up breaking me?
choice_data_list: I could.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
choice_data_list: But I will never break you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan looks at me like she's puzzling
something over. I've already decided how I'm
going to answer her question.
choice_data_list: I'd like to show you something.
I'd like to show you something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: You've... something to show me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I take out my tablet and hand it to Mejiro Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Is this... a race agenda... and a training regimen?
And not just one, but multiple variations?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Th-this can't be—
choice_data_list: This is the extent of my resolve.
This is the extent of my resolve.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The tablet I showed Mejiro Ardan contains a slew
of race agendas and training plans I've devised
for her junior year and onwards.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Those plans also incorporate every foreseeable
scenario I could think of pertaining to Mejiro
Ardan's health and well-being.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... Does this mean... You understood what I
was trying to say?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Of course I do. The way she's testing me with this
talk of consequences... I know she's just pushing
me away out of kindness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The thing is, I don't want kindness. I want
something else...
choice_data_list: Ardan, I wish to remain as your trainer.
Ardan, I wish to remain as your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's because I want to remain as her trainer that
I've thought about what I should do in that role,
and what she might want from me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide that now's the time to put my answer into
words. As Mejiro Ardan's trainer...
choice_data_list: I won't let your light go out.
I won't let your light go out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I'll make sure to protect her fragile
body, so she'll be able to shine on in all her races,
now and forever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And to help her—this racer who lives in the
moment, and only has eyes for the now...
choice_data_list: I'll forge a path to your future.
I'll forge a path to your future.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It was after my debut race... The evening of the
day I was transferred to the family rest house...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...That night, I had a dream.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: In my dream, I heard the sound of glass cracking.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The sensation of everything spilling out from my
fractured body was so cold, so vivid...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't put that dream behind me... And so
today, I found myself questioning you, in a
manner most uncouth.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I'm truly, terribly sorry for that.
choice_data_list: If anything, I'm glad you did put those questions to me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
choice_data_list: Thanks to you, my resolve is stronger than ever.
Thanks to you, my resolve is stronger than ever.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer...
choice_data_list: Please let me accompany you on your journey.
Please let me accompany you on your journey.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...How could I ever refuse?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I would love to have you beside me as we
continue this journey...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, Mejiro Ardan and I go and speak with her
physician.

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text: I hereby acknowledge both of your intentions.

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
As Lady Ardan's chief physician, I hereby give her
my formal permission to return to the academy.
choice_data_list: Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much.

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
However, note that I may have to rescind this
decision in the event that something were to
happen to Lady Ardan again.
choice_data_list: Duly noted.

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
...This is little more than my personal opinion, but
I fully support the decision you've both made.

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
Feel free to come to me with any concerns you
might have. Now though, I shall be taking my
leave.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer, it sounds like he believes in you as well.
choice_data_list:
I'll do everything I possibly can to meet his
expectations.

I'll do everything I possibly can to meet his
expectations.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. And so will I.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Mejiro Ardan's nanny drives the two
of us from the rest house back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you for dropping us off, Nanny.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text:
I've informed the master and mistress of today's
developments.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh. I've just written Father and Mother a letter
myself, to let them know.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I shall message you once I've arrived at the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text:
My lady. As you walk this path you've committed
yourself to... please do take care of yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I shall. I'll not for a moment forget that I've
chosen the steepest, most strenuous path of all.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text: I'll be thinking of you, always. Best of luck to you.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text: Trainer.
choice_data_list: Yes?

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text: ...Please take good care of Lady Ardan.
choice_data_list: You have my word.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan's nanny bows deeply upon hearing
my response, then leaves without uttering
another word.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you for coming to see me today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Now, concerning our plans moving forward...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering if perhaps I could trouble you to
decide on each of the races I'll be running during
my junior year.
choice_data_list:
Of course. Are you sure you don't mind me
choosing all of them, though?

Of course. Are you sure you don't mind me
choosing all of them, though?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. Because I've made a decision of my
own today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I've decided to pursue the future that you have
laid out for me.
choice_data_list: Ardan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: As such, I ask for your guidance on what I ought to focus on now, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing her say that, I feel as if Mejiro Ardan...
might be placing a little more trust in me than she
was before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My determination to support her grows stronger
yet—she's putting her life in my hands!
choice_data_list: Let's work on improving, little by little.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What Mejiro Ardan needs right now is both
hands-on experience and the physical capacity to
last an entire race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During her junior year, I plan to have her continue
training as she accumulates actual racing
experience at a pace that suits her.
choice_data_list:
After that, we can aim for a grander stage for
you to shine on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Very well. In other words, it appears as though it's
time for me to undergo quite some rigorous
training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I shall be counting on you once again, Trainer,
starting tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With both of us fully prepared for what lies
ahead, Mejiro Ardan and I welcome her junior
year!
